rules.rule_text:
title: Login by Storm-0940 Threat Actor
id: a4b0a3ae-cdc3-40b2-a393-321fb3415c27
description: A logon with application ID and user agent used by the threat actor tracked
  as Storm-0940
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2024/10/31/chinese-threat-actor-storm-0940-uses-credentials-from-password-spray-attacks-from-a-covert-network/
status: test
author: NTT Security - Kim Bokholm
date: 2024-11-07
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: signinlogs
detection:
  selection:
    AppId|cased:
    - 1950a258-227b-4e31-a9cf-717495945fc2
    - 00000003-0000-0000-c000-000000000000
    userAgent:
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; WOW64; Trident/7.0; rv:11.0) like Gecko
    - Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko)
      Chrome/80.0.3987.149 Safari/537.36
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
